name: Krishna Kumar Iyer
text: As a first-time home buyer, it was an absolute delight to work with Pooja as my realtor. I valued her patience, communication, caring and personalized approach the most. She educated me on each step, from mortgage pre-approval to closing. She was always prompt in answering my phone calls and emails and kept me updated on the progress with the buying process. She also kept in mind my preferences and lifestyle and made recommendations that were so helpful. These recommendations also came from a place of care to ensure that I had all the necessary information to make some informed decisions. Her proactiveness with everything and efficiency was remarkable. I was able to close within two months of starting the process because of that. I wouldn't hesitate, even for a bit, to recommend Pooja, to anyone who is out there wanting to buy their dream home!
